table.column: , 21952, After all functions are compiled and linked into a single design
, , After user unroll and inline pragmas are applied
(1) unroll, 110821 *, user unroll pragmas are applied
(2) simplification, 45341, simplification of applied user unroll pragmas
(3) inline, 36861, user inline pragmas are applied
(4) simplification, 32030, simplification of applied user inline pragmas
, , After user array partition and struct aggregate/disaggregate pragmas are applied
(1) array partition, 27490, user array partition pragmas are applied
(2) simplification, 27122, simplification of applied user array partition & struct aggregate/disaggregate pragmas
(3) aggregate/disaggregate , 27236, user struct aggregate/disaggregate pragmas are applied
(4) array reshape, 35518, apply array reshape pragmas
(5) access patterns, 30651, array access pattern optmizations
, , After transformations are applied to meet performance pragma targets
(1) loop simplification, 29762, loop and instruction simplification
(2) parallelization, 32098, loops are unrolled or pipelined to meet performance targets
(3) array partition, 31600, arrays are partitioned to meet performance targets
(4) simplification, 31600, simplification of design after performance transformations
, , After hardware transfomations
(1) lowering, 29856, initial conversion to HW specific instructions
(2) optimizations, 30656, high level synthesis optimizations

item.name: Instructions per Function for each Compilation Phase

row.col0: zeropad2d_cl<nnet::array<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, 2>, nnet::array<ap_fixed<16, 6, AP_TRN, AP_WRAP, 0>, 2>, config24>

table.column: 100000, Show a warning when total design instructions exceeds this value
